note: The labeled exemplar set rubric-check.py runs the prd-quality gate (bin/spec-quality-check.py — a PRD is a contract-bearing spec artifact) against, to PROVE the gate discriminates on the dimensions a PRD relies on: schema-valid, user-acceptance-checkable (= criteria-checkable), non-goals-present. Reuses the spec-review-calibration fixtures that exercise exactly those mechanical gates (referenced, not copied — no drift); the unsound-decomposition fixture is omitted as a PRD declares no decomposition. The outside-in product judgment is the [review] half, not the mechanical gate proven here.
